Payments.amount: Each product/service listing requires a small service fee, calculated dynamically based on category and price.
Payments.middlemen: Our platform eliminates middlemen charges — you connect directly with providers.

Listings.post: To post a product/service, go to your dashboard → 'Create Listing'. Providers must complete payment before posting.
Listings.delete: You can delete a listing from your dashboard under 'My Listings'.
Listings.contact provider: Open the listing and click 'Contact Provider' to start a WhatsApp-style chat.
Listings.search: Use the search bar at the top of the homepage to find products or services.

Complaints.complain: Log complaints via 'Report an Issue' → include transaction reference ID for fraud cases.
Complaints.fraud: Please log complaints via 'Report an Issue' → include transaction reference ID for fraud cases.
Complaints.ghost account: Ghost accounts are flagged and removed by admin. Report suspicious accounts via 'Report an Issue'.

General.working hours: Our support team is available daily from 8 AM to 6 PM.
General.login: Use the login form at the top right. If you forgot your password, click 'Forgot Password'.
